items.summary: The National Testing Agency (NTA) on Tuesday cancelled the NEET (UG) 2026 exam held on May 3 amid allegations of paper leak.

items.title: Rush for commerce and allied courses as college admissions begin
items.summary: Admissions to government arts and science colleges in the State commenced on May 7 with online registration enabled through the official www.tngasa.in portal.

items.title: Migratory birds read invisible maps
items.summary: On World Migratory Bird Day (May 9), a case study of the Common pochard, exploring possible reasons why this bird could be ‘warming up to’ birders in the Chennai Metropolitan Area but giving those in Madurai the cold shoulder
